states.name: active
states.description: Logical Object may receive new immutable Revisions and relationships.
entry_requirements: At least one valid Object Revision exists.

states.name: superseded
states.description: Another Object is the preferred logical successor while this Object and history remain retained.
entry_requirements: Replacement Object reference and authority are recorded.

states.name: tombstoned
states.description: Object is logically deleted/unavailable under policy while retained history and references remain.
entry_requirements: Tombstone reason, authority, retention and replacement if any are recorded.

required_preconditions: Canonical Object ID and first immutable Revision exist.
Replacement Object and reason are retained; no history is rewritten.
Retention/legal-hold analysis is recorded; physical byte deletion is a separate decision.
